title.description: The title of the assessment (e.g., 'Derivatives and anti-derivatives').

set.description: Which assessmentSet this one belongs to (e.g., 'Homework', 'Practice Quiz').

number.description: The number of this assessment within the set (e.g., '1', '2R', '3B').

allowIssueReporting.description: Whether to allow students to report issues for assessment questions

multipleInstance.description: Whether to allow students to create additional instances of the assessment

shuffleQuestions.description: Whether the questions will be shuffled in the student view of an assessment. If the assessment type is Exam, this is true by default, and otherwise false.

allowAccess.description: List of access rules for the assessment. Access is permitted if any access rule is satisfied.

accessControl.description: Access control settings for the assessment.

text.description: HTML text shown on the assessment overview page.

maxPoints.description: The number of points that must be earned in this assessment to achieve a score of 100%.

maxBonusPoints.description: The maximum number of additional points that can be earned beyond maxPoints.

allowPersonalNotes.description: Whether students are allowed to upload personal notes for this assessment.

autoClose.description: Whether to automatically close the assessment after a period of inactivity.

zones.description: Array of "zones" in the assessment, each containing questions that can be randomized within the zone.

constantQuestionValue.description: Whether to keep the value of a question constant after a student solves it correctly.

allowRealTimeGrading.description: Removes the student "Grade" buttons to prevent real-time grading while the assessment is being taken. Real-time grading is allowed by default.

requireHonorCode.description: Requires the student to accept an honor code before starting the assessment. Set to true for Exam assessments by default. Only configurable for Exam assessments.

honorCode.description: Custom text for the honor code to be accepted before starting the assessment. Only available for Exam assessments.

groupWork.description: Whether the assessment will support group work. DEPRECATED -- prefer using the "groups" property instead.

groupMaxSize.description: Maximum number of students in a group. DEPRECATED -- prefer using the "groups" property instead.

groupMinSize.description: Minimum number of students in a group. DEPRECATED -- prefer using the "groups" property instead.

groupRoles.description: Array of custom user roles in a group. DEPRECATED -- prefer using the "groups" property instead.

canSubmit.description: A list of group role names that can submit questions. Only applicable for group assessments. DEPRECATED -- prefer using the "groups" property instead.

canView.description: A list of group role names that can view questions. Only applicable for group assessments. DEPRECATED -- prefer using the "groups" property instead.

studentGroupCreate.description: Whether students can create groups. DEPRECATED -- prefer using the "groups" property instead.

studentGroupChooseName.description: Whether students can choose a group name when creating a group. Only applicable if studentGroupCreate is true. DEPRECATED -- prefer using the "groups" property instead.

studentGroupJoin.description: Whether students can join groups. DEPRECATED -- prefer using the "groups" property instead.

studentGroupLeave.description: Whether students can leave groups. DEPRECATED -- prefer using the "groups" property instead.

enabled.description: Whether groups are enabled for this assessment.

minMembers.description: Minimum number of students in a group.

maxMembers.description: Maximum number of students in a group.

roles.description: Array of custom user roles in a group.

canNameGroup.description: Whether students can choose a group name when creating a group.

canAssignRoles.description: Role names that can assign other users to roles.

canView.description: Role names that can view questions.

canSubmit.description: Role names that can submit questions.

advanceScorePerc.description: Minimum score percentage to unlock access to subsequent questions.

gradeRateMinutes.description: Minimum amount of time (in minutes) between graded submissions to the same question.

module.description: Module that this assessment belongs to, as defined in infoCourse.json.

shareSourcePublicly.description: If true, the assessment's JSON configuration and question list are available for others to view and copy.

AssessmentAccessRuleJsonSchema.description: An access rule that permits people to access this assessment. All restrictions in the rule must be satisfied for the rule to allow access.

mode.description: The server mode required for access.

examUuid.description: The PrairieTest exam UUID for which a student must be registered. Implies mode: Exam.

uids.description: A list of UIDs (like 'username@example.com'), one of which is required for access.

credit.description: How much credit is awarded for doing the homework, as a percentage (100 means full credit).

startDate.description: The earliest date on which access is permitted.

endDate.description: The latest date on which access is permitted.

timeLimitMin.description: The time limit to complete the assessment, in minutes (only for Exams).

password.description: Password to begin the assessment (only for Exams).

showClosedAssessment.description: Whether the student can view the assessment after it has been closed

showClosedAssessmentScore.description: Whether the student can view the assessment grade after it has been closed. Only works if showClosedAssessment is also set to false

active.description: Whether the student can create a new assessment instance and submit answers to questions. If set to false, the available credit must be 0.

title.description: Zone title, displayed to the students at the top of the question list for the zone.

maxPoints.description: Only this many of the points that are awarded for answering questions in this zone will count toward the total points.

numberChoose.description: Number of questions to choose from this zone.

bestQuestions.description: Only this many of the questions in this zone, with the highest number of awarded points, will count toward the total points.

lockpoint.description: If true, students must explicitly acknowledge advancing past this point. All questions in previous zones become read-only after crossing.

questions.description: Array of questions in the zone.

advanceScorePerc.description: Minimum score percentage to unlock access to subsequent questions.

gradeRateMinutes.description: Minimum amount of time (in minutes) between graded submissions to the same question.

allowRealTimeGrading.description: Whether to allow real-time grading for questions in this zone. If not specified, inherits from the assessment level.

canSubmit.description: A list of group role names that can submit questions in this zone. Only applicable for group assessments.

canView.description: A list of group role names that can view questions in this zone. Only applicable for group assessments.

tools.description: Tools available for questions in this zone. Overrides assessment-level tools.

enabled.description: Whether this assessment tool is enabled.

id.description: Question ID (directory name of the question).

forceMaxPoints.description: Whether to force this question to be awarded maximum points on a regrade.

alternatives.description: Array of question alternatives to choose from.

numberChoose.description: Number of questions to choose from this pool.

triesPerVariant.description: The maximum number of graded submissions allowed for each question instance.

advanceScorePerc.description: Minimum score percentage to unlock access to subsequent questions.

gradeRateMinutes.description: Minimum amount of time (in minutes) between graded submissions to the same question.

allowRealTimeGrading.description: Whether to allow real-time grading for this question. If not specified, inherits from the zone level.

canSubmit.description: A list of group role names that can submit the question. Only applicable for group assessments.

canView.description: A list of group role names that can view the question. Only applicable for group assessments.

preferences.description: The preferences passed to the question to customize its behavior.

forceMaxPoints.description: Whether to force this question to be awarded maximum points on a regrade.

triesPerVariant.description: The maximum number of graded submissions allowed for each question instance.

advanceScorePerc.description: Minimum score percentage to unlock access to subsequent questions.

gradeRateMinutes.description: Minimum amount of time (in minutes) between graded submissions to the same question.

allowRealTimeGrading.description: Whether to allow real-time grading for this question alternative. If not specified, inherits from the question level.

preferences.description: The preferences passed to the question to customize its behavior.

QuestionIdJsonSchema.description: Question ID (directory name of the question).

ForceMaxPointsJsonSchema.description: Whether to force this question to be awarded maximum points on a regrade.

AdvanceScorePercJsonSchema.description: Minimum score percentage to unlock access to subsequent questions.

LegacyGroupRoleJsonSchema.description: A custom role for use in group assessments that allows control over certain permissions.

name.description: The group role's name (i.e. Manager, Reflector, Recorder).

minimum.description: The minimum number of users that should be in this role in a group.

maximum.description: The maximum number of users that should be in this role in a group.

canAssignRoles.description: Whether users with this role can assign other users' group roles.

GroupsRoleJsonSchema.description: A custom role for use in group assessments.

name.description: The group role's name (e.g., Manager, Recorder).

minMembers.description: The minimum number of users that should be in this role.

maxMembers.description: The maximum number of users that should be in this role.

labels.description: Array of student label names this set targets

listBeforeRelease.description: Only valid on the first entry (defaults). Whether to list the assessment title before the release date. Students can see the title but cannot open the assessment. Defaults to false.

releaseDate.description: Release date as ISO String. If absent or null, no date-based access is granted.

earlyDeadlines.description: Array of early deadlines with credit as percentages

lateDeadlines.description: Array of late deadlines with credit as percentages

afterLastDeadline.description: Controls for assessment behaviour after last deadline

exams.description: Array of associated PrairieTest exam configs

readOnly.description: Whether the exam is read-only for students

hideQuestions.description: Whether to hide questions after assessment completion. When false, questions are shown until showQuestionsAgainDate (if set).

showQuestionsAgainDate.description: Date as ISO String for when hidden questions become visible again after assessment completion

hideQuestionsAgainDate.description: Date as ISO String for when questions are re-hidden after being shown again

hideScore.description: Whether to hide scores after assessment completion. When true, scores are hidden until showScoreAgainDate (if set).

showScoreAgainDate.description: Date as ISO String for when hidden scores become visible again after assessment completion

date.description: Date as ISO String for additional deadline

credit.description: Amount of credit as a percent to allow
